song.title: Better is One Day
song.author: Matt Redman
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . E A2 Bsus How lovely is Your dwelling place, oh Lord, Almighty. .E Bsus My soul longs and even faints for You . E A2 Bsus For here my heart is satisfied, within Your presence . E Bsus I sing beneath the shadow of Your wings.
[C] . A2 Better is one day in Your courts . Bsus Better is one day in Your house . A Better is one day in Your courts . Bsus Than thousands elsewhere. |(repeat)
[V2] One thing I ask and I would seek, To see Your beauty To find You in the place Your glory dwells. |(repeat)
[B] .C#M Bsus My heart and flesh cry out, .A Bsus For You the living God .C#m7 Bsus A Bsus Your Spirit's water for my soul. .C#m Bsus I've tasted and I've seen, .A2 Come once again to me. .C#m7 I will draw near to You .A2 F#m B I will draw near to You.
